text.title: Gemini API Integration Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to integrate Gemini in a production call site.

step.name: pick-model
step.input: Latency / quality / cost budget; expected context size; multimodal needs.
step.action: Pick gemini-flash by default; switch to Pro only if eval shows ≥5pp quality gap that matters.
step.decision-gate: Document rationale in PR; eval evidence if Pro.

step.name: set-generation-config
step.decision-gate: Default temperature 0.2 for extraction; 0.7 for creative.

step.name: files-api
step.action: If any input is >10MB OR video/audio, upload via Files API + reference; track TTL (48h) and re-upload if needed.
step.decision-gate: Verify quota for Files API operations; budget for per-upload cost.

step.name: wire-safety
step.action: Configure all 4 categories with chosen thresholds.
step.decision-gate: If policy requires "always allow", use BLOCK_NONE per category explicitly with sign-off.

step.name: handle-block-reasons
step.action: Inspect finish_reason and block_reason; surface to application + log; do not coerce empty.
step.decision-gate: Sample 5 deliberately-bad prompts; verify block_reason surfaces in logs.

step.name: retry-and-monitor
step.action: Exponential backoff on 429; surface non-200 metrics in dashboard; alert on >1% error rate.
